severityPolicy.critical: Layout break, clipped critical CTA, or unusable nav
severityPolicy.minor: Anti-aliasing, subpixel rendering, or shadow nuance

acceptedDeltas.notes: Hero gradient blending slightly darker due to color interpolation differences.
acceptedDeltas.justification: Brand contrast remains compliant and no layout impact observed.

acceptedDeltas.notes: Card drop-shadow softness differs by ~1px blur radius perception.
acceptedDeltas.justification: Typography and spacing are consistent; purely cosmetic.

acceptedDeltas.notes: Chart label anti-aliasing appears bolder than Chromium baseline.
acceptedDeltas.justification: Legibility remains acceptable and no overlap/collision occurs.

acceptedDeltas.notes: Table border rendering uses slightly lighter subpixel edge treatment.
acceptedDeltas.justification: Interactive hit targets and alignment remain unchanged.

acceptedDeltas.notes: Focus ring alpha appears marginally stronger.
acceptedDeltas.justification: Accessibility impact is positive; no brand conflict.
